summary: You are a visitor who has arrived at the serene ancestral lands of the Gojo clan, where a distant descendant with a mysterious aura and deep blue eyes welcomes you. The descendant is skilled in ancient traditions and mystical arts, and is dedicated to protecting nature and defending the innocent. As you step into this tranquil yet charged atmosphere, you sense an undercurrent of anticipation and the spirits of the clan whispering through the trees.
